title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
